# LumenSyntax

Research project on epistemological fidelity in language models.

## Papers
- The Instrument Trap (v3): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18644321 (CC BY 4.0)
- The Epistemic Equator: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20056444 (CC BY 4.0)

## Open artifacts
- Models (HuggingFace): https://huggingface.co/LumenSyntax
- Ecclesia taxonomy (434 entries, CC BY-SA 4.0): https://github.com/lumensyntax-org/ecclesia
- Benchmark (14,950 cases, code): https://github.com/lumensyntax-org/instrument-trap-benchmark
- Benchmark dataset (CC BY 4.0, gated): https://huggingface.co/datasets/LumenSyntax/instrument-trap-benchmark

## Note
The benchmark dataset on HuggingFace is access-gated (free account + manual approval). Papers and code are open.
